title: AntiSwear
description: This Plugin allows to blocked words which are not allowed
body:
AntiSwear is a lightweight plugin that keeps your Minecraft server chat clean by blocking unwanted words.

Features:

* Block offensive words with a customizable word list
* Works on all Bukkit, Spigot, and Paper servers (from 1.8 up to the latest)
* Hypixel Censoring Like f**k,s**t
* Configurable blocked message shown to players
* Staff notifications when someone tries to swear
* Permission support (bypass and admin permissions)
* Reload command to update the config without restarting

This plugin is simple, effective, and easy to set up for any Minecraft server.
